
Running VQE with OVOS optimization for Li2 w. bond length 4.6 in basis 6-31G with 75% active virtual orbitals and orbital opt. = False...

Number of electrons: 6, Number of orbitals: 18
Initial MO coefficients are restricted (RHF-like).
Optimizing 11 active virtual orbitals (out of 15 total virtual orbitals).

OVOS optimized orbitals are unrestricted (UHF-like).

OVOS optimized energy = -15.884404 Hartree @ iterations 62.

Calculating UHF reference for comparison...

Calculating UMP2 natural orbitals for comparison...
